description: A ring mesh is a component that generates a ring of quads that has an ``InnerRadius``, ``OuterRadius``, and resolution which is the ``Segments`` field.

fields.Rotation: Rotate the entire mesh by this.
fields.Segments: how sub divisions length wise this ring mesh has (smoothness of the arc)
fields.Arc: how much of a circle from 0360 this mesh should take up.
fields.InnerRadius: The radius of the inner circle of this ring mesh.
fields.OuterRadius: The radius of the outer circle of this ring mesh.
fields.UVScale: The scale of material details and colors on the mesh.
